description:
Safe Genshin Impact mod with beautiful shaders, FPS unlocker, and 3DMigoto support.

Enhanced graphics, carefully crafted shaders, impressive FPS unlocking, and mods provide players with an even better gameplay experience than ever before. Rediscover the world of Teyvat with new visuals. A dedicated launcher streamlines the entire process, allowing players to jump into the action quickly and easily. Take your gameplay to the next level. Immerse yourself in the enhanced world of Teyvat and create unforgettable moments.
Stella Mod Launcher
1. The launcher will no longer download the configuration file for FPS Unlocker.
2. Fixed an issue where, after an update, Stella Mod Launcher created a shortcut on the client machine even though it did not previously exist.
3. The launcher will no longer manage shortcuts on the Desktop or in the Start Menu on the client machine.
4. Improved communication flow between Stella Mod Launcher and Genshin Stella Mod.
Configuration
1. The properties NewShortcutsOnDesktop and InternetShortcutsInStartMenu have been removed, as shortcuts are now managed by the installer instead of the Stella software.
Installer
1. The installer can now create shortcuts in the Start Menu.
2. Fixed shortcut creation handling after a successful Stella software update.
FPS Unlocker
1. FPS Unlocker can now automatically retrieve the game path from the registry at Computer\HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Stella Mod Launcher.
2. Fixed known issues with the configuration file.
3. NEW! Added the ability to define custom launch parameters for the game.
4. NEW! Added a preview of the generated command in the settings.
Full Changelog: v8.10.0.0...v8.10.1.0
